categories.app_accessibility_desc: Checks how the app is shared and distributed
categories.multimedia_desc: Checks for the presence and configuration of audio and video features
categories.play_store_presence_desc: Checks the find-ability and attractiveness of the Play Store listing
categories.scripture_text_content_desc: Checks for the presence, completeness and features of Scripture text content
categories.supplementary_materials_desc: Evaluate the presence and quality of supplementary materials (ex. glossary, illustrations, reading plan, etc)
categories.thinking_beyond_desc: Checks for availability outside just the standard app
categories.user_engagement_desc: Checks for user engagement and feedback features
categories.user_experience_desc: Checks for enhanced app features like menus, keyboard, and graphics

details.clickable_references_details: Clickable references check not implemented yet
details.multilingual_scripts_details: Multilingual scripts check not implemented yet
details.reading_plan_details: Reading plan check not implemented yet
details.red_letter_text_details: No Red Letter (words of Jesus) option available
details.study_bible_material_details: Study Bible material check not implemented yet
details.topical_index_details: Topical index check not implemented yet
details.found_books_not_nt_ot: Found %d books in appdef, not from NT or OT
details.found_nt_ot_books: Found %d NT books and %d OT books in appdef
details.all_nt_no_ot: All 27 NT books found in appdef, without OT books
details.all_nt_plus_other: All 27 NT books found in appdef, plus %d other books
details.all_ot_nt: All OT and NT books found in appdef
details.red_letter_available: Red Letter (words of Jesus) option available

line_items.about_box_in_vernacular_desc: About box information in vernacular language (not just English) (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.about_box_information_desc: Appropriate information in About... box copyright, etc. (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.app_description_desc: Helpful description of App and good range of searchable key words (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.audio_desc: Checks for the presence and extent of audio (0=No audio, 1=Some books, 2=All books, 3=Glossary audio)
line_items.clickable_references_desc: Check if cross-references and parallel passages are linked to text
line_items.contact_details_desc: Contact details for follow-up like phone, email or website (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.content_presence_desc: Check if Scripture text content is present in the build output
line_items.customized_graphics_desc: Customized splash screen, drawer, interface icon (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.dbl_text_desc: Text in DBL available for other Paratext users (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.demo_video_desc: Demo video in PlayStore on how to use features (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.glossary_desc: Check for presence and quality of glossary
line_items.illustrations_desc: Check for presence and quality of illustrations
line_items.keyboard_desc: Keyboard for search/notes (0=No vernacular, 1=Vernacular buttons, 2=Embedded Keyman, 3=Predictive)
line_items.multilingual_scripts_desc: Check for presence of text in additional scripts or languages
line_items.play_store_publishing_desc: Published on Google PlayStore (0=No, 1=Local account, 2=SIL/Kalaam media)
line_items.reading_plan_desc: Check for presence of daily reading plan
line_items.red_letter_text_desc: Check for presence of red letter text in NT books
line_items.study_bible_material_desc: Check for presence of study Bible material (ex. notes, maps, charts, etc)
line_items.style_adjustments_desc: Appropriate adjustments to Styles to improve app (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.synchronized_highlighting_desc: Checks for highlighting of verses with audio (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.text_changes_desc: Appropriate changes made to underlying text (0=No, 1=Enhancements defined)
line_items.text_feedback_desc: Text editable for feedback by email (0=No, 1=Yes)
line_items.topical_index_desc: Check for presence of topical index
line_items.video_desc: Checks video links/clips presence (0=No, 1=Jesus film Luke, 2=captions, 3=other gospels, 4=other links)
line_items.web_site_text_desc: Text available through web site (0=None, 1=Online, 2=Online with synchronized audio)
